name: Inside Line
overview: Get an insider look into what goes on behind the scenes of the Australia Supercars Championship. Enjoy an unprecedented look into the highs, the lows, and everything else in between of what it's like to be part of a Supercars race team.

trailers.title: Inside Line: A season with Erebus Motorsport Trailer | Supercars | Kayo
